1 shipment is overdue — PrintPro's $62K 3 days overdue. Of your $138K inbound, $90K is at risk this week; one delivery is also partial. Chase PrintPro before it gaps the restock window.

Real landed cost vs what your POs assumed
+$8,400
POs assumed $391,200 · actually landed at $399,600
Your real cost ran $8,400 over what the POs estimated this month — almost entirely freight and duty surprises, not the unit price. Reconciled on receipt and pushed into true landed cost, so CM1 stays honest.
